# mozjpeg-rs public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).

# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.

pub fn Encode::encode_gray(&self, &[u8], u32, u32) -> Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>

pub trait EncodeablePixel: core::marker::Copy [also: imgref_ext]
pub const EncodeablePixel::IS_GRAYSCALE: bool
pub fn EncodeablePixel::to_gray(&self) -> u8
pub fn EncodeablePixel::to_rgb(&self) -> (u8, u8, u8)
pub type Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, Error>

## trait impls (17 types)
